name: Yousef Sarama
title: Full Stack Developer
bio: Passionate developer creating beautiful and functional web experiences
about: Dynamic Full Stack Developer with a passion for building scalable web applications and innovativesolutions. Proficient in both frontend and back-end technologies, I leverage my skills in JavaScript,React, Node.js and Django to deliver seamless user experiences. Eager to contribute to a forward-thinking team that values creativity and collaboration
highlights: Expert in React & modern JavaScript frameworks
Proficient in Django & Python backend development
Strong MySQL database design & optimization skills
Experience with AI/ML integration in web applications

projects.title: SIIN Enterprise Web Platform
projects.description: A professional enterprise web application developed for SIIN Company, featuring a modern frontend architecture built with JavaScript, CSS, and HTML. The platform delivers a responsive user interface with optimized performance and clean code structure.
highlights: Architected and developed a robust JavaScript-based frontend (94.9% of codebase) with optimized performance and scalability
Implemented responsive design patterns and professional CSS styling (4.5%) ensuring cross-browser compatibility and modern UI/UX standards
Maintained semantic HTML5 markup structure (0.6%) following industry best practices and accessibility guidelines

projects.title: University Event Management System
projects.description: A comprehensive full-stack event management platform designed for universities, enabling seamless event creation, real-time student participation tracking, and collaborative event coordination. Built with modern TypeScript backend architecture and Python integration for robust data processing and management.
highlights: Developed a scalable full-stack application with TypeScript backend (70.5%) featuring real-time event management and student participation workflows
Implemented Python-based data processing and business logic layer (26%) for advanced event analytics, reporting, and system integration capabilities
Engineered responsive HTML frontend (2.1%) with intuitive user interface for streamlined event discovery, registration, and participation management

projects.title: Jerusalem Fund Web Portal
projects.description: A professional front-end web application for the Jerusalem Fund initiative, featuring a modern, responsive design that showcases fund information and facilitates user engagement. Built with semantic HTML5 and advanced CSS styling to deliver an elegant, accessible, and high-performance user experience.
highlights: Designed and developed a responsive HTML5 web portal (50.5%) with semantic markup and accessibility standards for optimal user experience across all devices
Implemented advanced CSS3 styling and animations (48.9%) creating a visually compelling interface with modern design patterns and professional branding
Engineered dynamic frontend interactions (0.6%) with JavaScript to enhance user engagement and provide seamless navigation throughout the platform

experience.description: Worked as a Front-End Developer focusing on building modern, responsive, and high-performance web interfaces using React and Tailwind CSS. Collaborated closely with backend teams to integrate APIs and deliver seamless user experiences.
achievements: Developed responsive and modern user interfaces using React and Tailwind CSS
Implemented UI/UX best practices to improve user engagement and accessibility
Collaborated with backend developers to integrate REST APIs securely and efficiently
Optimized front-end performance, reducing load times and improving responsiveness
Maintained clean, scalable, and reusable component-based code

experience.description: Freelance Web Developer delivering end-to-end web solutions for clients, from requirements gathering to deployment. Worked independently and remotely to build responsive, performant websites aligned with business goals and client branding.
achievements: Delivered complete web solutions independently while meeting tight deadlines
Collaborated remotely with clients to translate business requirements into technical solutions
Developed responsive, cross-device websites using modern frontend technologies
Integrated APIs to support dynamic content and real-time functionality
Improved website performance and usability through optimized code and UI/UX best practices

education.description: Completed a Bachelor's degree in Software Engineering with strong focus on Full-Stack Web Development, Database Systems, and Machine Learning. Gained hands-on experience through multiple academic and practical projects using modern technologies and Agile development practices.
